metadata.title: Mai Samar da Fayafayan Launuka Kyauta – Fayafayai 9 Daga Launi Ɗaya
metadata.description: Samar da fayafayan launuka 9 daga launi guda ɗaya: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, pastel da ƙari. Kwafa lambobin HEX cikin dannawa ɗaya. Ba buƙatar rajista, ba iyaka.

hero.title: Mai samar da fayafayan launuka
hero.description: Shigar da launi guda ɗaya na tushe, kayan aikin zai samar da fayafayan launuka 9 masu jituwa: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, pastel, da ƙari. Ana iya kwafa kowane launi tare da lambar HEX ɗinsa.

software.name: Mai samar da fayafayan launuka
alternateName: Mai samar da launuka ta yanar gizo
software.description: Mai samar da fayafayan launuka kyauta ta yanar gizo. Shigar da launi HEX ɗaya kayan aikin zai samar da tsare-tsare 9: monochromatic, analogous, complementary, triadic, split-complementary, pastel, duhu, tonal, da minimalist. Ana iya kwafa kowane launi tare da lambar HEX da ƙimar HSL.
featureList: Tsarin monochromatic - inuwar launi guda ɗaya
Tsarin analogous - launuka makwabta a kan da'irar launuka
Tsarin triadic - launuka 3 a tazara daidai
Tsarin split-complementary - launin tushe da makwabta 2 na akasinsa
Fayafayan pastel - launuka masu haske, masu laushi
Fayafayan duhu - launuka masu zurfi don jigogin duhu
Fayafayan tonal - ma'aunin haske na launi guda ɗaya
Fayafayan minimalist - launi mai ƙarfi tare da launuka masu laushi
Mai zaɓar launi don zaɓi ta gani
Ƙimar HSL ana nuna ta kusa da kowane launi
Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida

howTo.name: Yadda ake samar da fayafayan launuka daga launi guda ɗaya na tushe
howTo.description: Yadda ake samar da fayafayan launuka 9 daga launi guda ɗaya na tushe: monochromatic, complementary, triadic, pastel, da ƙari. Ana iya kwafa kowane launi tare da lambar HEX ɗinsa.

steps.name: Zaɓi launin tushe
steps.text: Shigar da lambar HEX a cikin filin rubutu ko yi amfani da mai zaɓar launi don zaɓi launi ta gani.

steps.name: Tabbatar da launi
steps.text: Tabbatar da launin da aka zaɓa tare da maɓallin Sabunta Launi - kayan aikin zai samar da fayafayai bisa launin tushe da ka zaɓa.

steps.name: Duba fayafayai
steps.text: Kayan aikin zai samar da fayafayai 9 daban-daban ta atomatik: monochromatic, analogous, complementary, triadic, split-complementary, pastel, duhu, tonal, da minimalist.

steps.name: Kwafa launuka
steps.text: Kusa da kowane launi za ka sami maɓallin Kwafa - ana kwafa lambar HEX zuwa clipboard na tsarinku.

contentBlocks.title: Me ya sa za a samar da fayafayan launuka?
contentBlocks.html:
Fayafayan launuka mai daidaituwa ita ce tushen kowane aikin gani - daga gidan yanar gizo, ta hanyar alama, zuwa kayan bugu. Zaɓar launuka da ke aiki tare da hannu yana buƙatar sanin ka'idar launuka. Mai samar da yana yin hakan ta atomatik: ka ba da launi guda ɗaya na tushe (misali, launin alamar ka), kayan aikin kuma ya ƙirƙiri saitin launuka 9 bisa tsare-tsaren jituwar launuka da aka tabbatar.

Kowane launi da aka samar yana zuwa tare da lambar HEX ɗinsa (misali, #4F6BF5) da ƙimar HSL (hue, saturation, lightness). Ana iya liƙa lambar HEX kai tsaye cikin CSS, Figma, Canva, ko kowane aikace-aikacen zane.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai samar da fayafayan launuka
contentBlocks.description: Dukan tsarin yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Shigar da launin tushe
items.description: Buga lambar HEX (misali, #4F6BF5) a cikin filin rubutu ko zaɓi launi daga mai zaɓar launi. Kuma za ka iya amfani da maɓallin Launin Bazuwar.

items.title: 2. Tabbatar da zaɓinka
items.description: Bayan dannawa maɓallin Sabunta Launi, kayan aikin zai samar da fayafayai 9 ta atomatik bisa tsare-tsaren jituwar launuka daban-daban.

items.title: 3. Kwafa launukan da kake buƙata
items.description: Kusa da kowane launi akwai maɓallin Kwafa - lambar HEX tana zuwa clipboard kuma ana iya liƙa ta kai tsaye cikin aikin ka.

contentBlocks.title: Wane irin tsare-tsaren launuka ne kayan aikin ke samarwa?
contentBlocks.description: Mai samar da yana ƙirƙirar nau'ikan fayafayai 9 - kowannensu ya dogara ne akan ka'idar launuka daban:

items.title: Fayafayan monochromatic
items.description: Inuwar launuka da yawa na launi guda ɗaya - daga haske zuwa duhu. Dukan launuka suna da launi iri ɗaya a kan da'irar launuka kuma sun bambanta kawai a cikin haske. Yana aiki sosai a cikin zane-zane masu kyau, masu sauƙi inda daidaituwa ta fi muhimmanci.

items.title: Fayafayan analogous
items.description: Launuka makwabta a kan da'irar launuka (an matsar da kusan 30° a bangarori biyu daga tushe). Suna ƙirƙirar sauye-sauyen launuka masu jituwa, masu santsi. Kyakkyawa don ayyuka da ke gina yanayi mai ɗumi ko sanyi.

items.title: Fayafayan complementary
items.description: Launin tushe da launin da ke gaba ɗaya a kan da'irar launuka (matsar da 180°). Yana ƙirƙirar bambancin gani mai ƙarfi. Yana da amfani inda wani abu ke buƙatar jawo hankali - maɓallai, taken da aka haskaka, tutocin tallace-tallace.

items.title: Fayafayan triadic
items.description: Launuka uku da ke da tazarar 120° a kan da'irar launuka - suna samar da alwatika mai daidaita. Haɗuwa mai rai, mai ƙarfi. Yana aiki sosai a cikin ayyukan kirkira: alamar ƙasa, kayan talla, fastoci.

items.title: Fayafayan split-complementary
items.description: Sigar fayafayan complementary mai laushi. Maimakon launi ɗaya na akasin, yana amfani da launuka biyu da aka matsar da kusan 30° daga complement. Yana ba da bambancin bayyananne amma ba tare da tashin hankali na gani mai ƙarfi ba.

items.title: Fayafayan pastel
items.description: Launi iri ɗaya tare da rage ƙarfin launi da ƙara haske - launuka masu laushi, masu taushi. Sun shahara a cikin kayan kwalliya, suturar yara, da masana'antar abinci. Suna tafiya da kyau tare da bayan farin fili.

items.title: Fayafayan duhu
items.description: Launin tushe a ƙarfin launi mai girma da rage haske - launuka masu zurfi, masu ƙarfi. Yana da amfani don ƙera jigogin duhu don gidajen yanar gizo da aikace-aikace, da kuma kayan alamar kasuwanci na musamman.

items.title: Fayafayan tonal
items.description: Matakai da yawa na haske na launi guda ɗaya - daga mai haske sosai zuwa duhu. Kwatankwacin ma'aunin tonal da ake amfani da su a cikin tsarin zane (misali, inuwa daga 50 zuwa 900). Yana da amfani don gina mu'amala inda launi iri ɗaya ke buƙatar bambance-bambance.

items.title: Fayafayan minimalist
items.description: Launi ɗaya mai ƙarfi da launuka masu haske da yawa masu laushi. Sauran fayafayan suna ci gaba da kasancewa a hankali. Yana aiki sosai a cikin mu'amala na zamani tare da farin fili da yawa - salon shafukan ƙasa da na siyarwa.

contentBlocks.title: Me ne mai samar da fayafayan launuka ke dogara a kai?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
H (hue)0°–360° a kan da'irar launuka
S (saturation)0%–100%
L (lightness)0%–100%
contentBlocks.html:
Ana ƙirƙirar dukan fayafayai ta hanyar canza launin tushe ta lissafi a cikin sararin launuka na HSL. HSL yana bayyana launi tare da ƙimomi uku: hue (H) shi ne matsayin a kan da'irar launuka (0°–360°), saturation (S) yana ƙayyade ƙarfin launi, kuma lightness (L) - yadda launi yake da haske ko duhu.

Fayafayan complementary, triadic, da split-complementary sun dogara ne a kan lissafin da'irar launuka - ana sanya launuka a tazara daidai, wanda ke ƙirƙirar daidaiton gani. Fayafayan monochromatic, pastel, da duhu suna canza haske da ƙarfin launi kawai yayin da suke riƙe launi iri ɗaya.

contentBlocks.title: Ina za a yi amfani da fayafayan launuka da aka samar

items.title: Asalin alamar kasuwanci ta gani
items.description: Zaɓi launuka masu dacewa don alama da ke akwai ko gina fayafayan alamar kasuwanci daga farko - don katin kasuwanci, takardun ofis, da kayan tallace-tallace.

items.title: Gidajen yanar gizo
items.description: Kafa launin farko, launin ƙarfafawa, da inuwar baya. Ana iya liƙa lambobin HEX da aka kwafa kai tsaye cikin takardun salon CSS ko tsarin jigo.

items.title: Mu'amalar aikace-aikace
items.description: Fayafayan tonal tana ba da bambance-bambancen haske na launi guda ɗaya - masu haske don baya, masu duhu don rubutu, matsakaici don iyakoki da yanayin hulɗa.

items.title: Zane-zanen kafofin watsa labarai na zamantakewa
items.description: Launuka masu daidaituwa don sakonnin, labarun, da murfi na bayanan martaba. Fayafayan analogous ko pastel suna aiki sosai lokacin da kake son salon da ake gane shi.

items.title: Gabatarwa da takardu
items.description: Saitin launuka masu jituwa don faifai, jadawali, da zane-zanen bayanai. Fayafayan monochromatic ko minimalist suna kiyaye tsari na gani.

contentBlocks.title: Warware matsalolin mai samar da fayafayai

items.title: Fayafayai ba su canja ba bayan shigar da launi
items.description: Kawai buga lambar HEX ba ya samar da fayafayai ta atomatik - kana buƙatar tabbatar da canjin tare da maɓallin Sabunta Launi. Sai bayan tabbatarwa ne kayan aikin ke sake ƙididdige dukan tsare-tsare 9.

items.title: Saƙon tsari mara inganci
items.description: Mai samar da yana karɓar tsarin HEX kawai tare da # a farkon, misali, #FF5500. Tsare-tsare ba tare da # ba (misali, FF5500) ko a cikin rubuce-rubucen RGB (misali, rgb(255,85,0)) ba a tallafa musu ba.

items.title: Tsarin HEX gajere da cikakke
items.description: Ana tallafawa tsare-tsare biyu: cikakke #RRGGBB (misali, #FF5500) da gajere #RGB (misali, #F50). Mai samar da yana gane duka biyun ta atomatik kuma yana bi da su daidai.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai samar da fayafayan launuka

items.question: Wane tsari ne launin tushe ya kamata ya kasance?
items.answer: Mai samar da yana karɓar launuka a tsarin HEX - duka gajere (misali, #F50) da cikakke (misali, #FF5500). Kusa da filin rubutu za ka sami mai zaɓar launi da ke baka damar zaɓar launi ta gani. Fayafayan da aka samar suna nuna lambar HEX da ƙimar HSL na kowane launi.
items.answerSchemaText: Mai samar da yana karɓar launuka HEX (#RGB ko #RRGGBB). Kowane launi da aka samar yana da lambar HEX da ƙimar HSL.

items.question: Launuka nawa ne kowane fayafaya ke ɗauke da su?
items.answer: Kowane fayafaya yana ɗauke da launuka 4 zuwa 6. Adadin ya dogara ne akan nau'in tsari - fayafayan monochromatic da tonal suna samar da inuwa da yawa (ma'aunin haske na launi guda ɗaya), yayin da fayafayan complementary da triadic suke mai da hankali akan launuka masu bambanci kaɗan.
items.answerSchemaText: Kowane fayafaya yana ɗauke da launuka 4 zuwa 6, ya danganta da nau'in tsari.

items.question: Menene sararin launuka na HSL kuma yaya ake karantarsa?
items.answer: HSL hanya ce ta bayyana launi ta amfani da ƙimomi uku: H (hue, 0°–360° a kan da'irar launuka), S (saturation, 0%–100%), da L (lightness, 0%–100%). Mai samar da yana nuna ƙimomin HSL kusa da kowane launi, wanda ke sauƙaƙe fahimtar yadda launuka a cikin fayafayan suke bambanta - misali, fayafayan monochromatic yana canza haske (L) kawai yayin da yake riƙe launi iri ɗaya (H).
items.answerSchemaText: HSL yana bayyana launi ta hanyar hue (H), saturation (S), da lightness (L). Mai samar da yana nuna waɗannan ƙimomi kusa da kowane launi.

items.question: Zan iya amfani da fayafayan da aka samar don kasuwanci?
items.answer: Eh. Za ka iya amfani da fayafayan launuka da aka samar a cikin kowane aiki - na kasuwanci da na ba kasuwanci ba, ba tare da ƙuntatawan lasisi ba.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh, ana iya amfani da fayafayan da aka samar ba tare da ƙuntata ba a cikin ayyukan kasuwanci da na ba kasuwanci ba.

items.question: Mai samar da fayafayan launuka yana buƙatar shiga ko biyan kuɗi?
items.answer: Mai samar da kyauta ne gaba ɗaya kuma ba ya buƙatar shiga ko rajista. Ana samar da launuka a cikin browser na gida - ba a aika bayanai zuwa sabar waje ba.
items.answerSchemaText: Mai samar da kyauta ne, ba ya buƙatar shiga. Ana samar da launuka a cikin browser na gida.
